hero_role_desc: Specialised in horizontal format: music videos, commercials and YouTube video. Vertical too.
work_aside_desc: Each case links to the full cut and making-of.
vertical_title: When the piece lives in the feed.
vertical_aside_desc: Cuts designed from the script for the first 3 seconds.
services_aside_desc: I direct, I edit and I answer.
service_1_desc: Concept, direction, colour and master delivery. Horizontal cut + vertical cut for socials.
service_2_desc: Retention-focused cuts: hook, pacing, B-roll, subtitles and thumbnail.
service_3_desc: Spots and branded content from 15 s to 2 min. Cinematic, broadcast-ready.
service_4_desc: Vertical pieces with A/B hooks, large subtitles and optimised exports.
service_5_desc: Look, LUTs and final grade in DaVinci Resolve. Also available standalone.
service_6_desc: From brief to delivery: crew, locations, shooting and post. Fixed package.
process_desc: Every project starts with a 30-minute call and ends with master + assets delivered via Drive. No surprises, no delays.
process_step_1_desc: We talk about the project, references, goals and deadlines. No commitment.
process_step_2_desc: Written treatment, timeline and fixed budget. Approved by both sides.
process_step_3_desc: Production, direction and assembly. Shared reviews on Frame.io with timecode.
process_step_4_desc: 4K horizontal master + 9:16 vertical cut + thumbnails + social assets.
about_title: Seven years making video for people who take their brand seriously.
about_lead: Hi, I'm Pol. Freelance director and editor based between Barcelona and Madrid, specialised in horizontal format for labels, brands and creators.
about_p1: I work alone or with a small trusted crew. That means a single point of contact, fast decisions and deliveries with no middlemen. Every piece goes through my hands from start to finish.
about_p2: If you need a music video that looks like cinema, a YouTube video that retains, or a commercial that holds up in 4K, let's talk.
contact_desc: Tell me briefly about the idea and I'll reply within 48 hours with availability, proposal and next step.
contact_form_lead: Takes less than a minute. I reply within 24-48 h.
form_message_placeholder: Concept, references, dates… write as you talk.
form_note: Confidential. Not shared with third parties.
footer_tagline: Video direction and editing for brands, labels and creators who take their work seriously.
footer_copyright: © 2026 Pol Sánchez Baena · All rights reserved
